description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has multiple jobs: GCC, Tarball, Clang, Docker push, and Docs push. Each job runs on ubuntu-20.04 or ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, and runs various scripts to build and test the project. The Docker push job builds and pushes a Docker image to Docker Hub, while the Docs push job generates documentation and pushes it to a GitHub repository.
